claim_boundary: Proposal-only AIDE session; no source mutation, automatic apply, merge, release, compatibility certification, or final artistic acceptance.
implementation_plan: Inspect the WorkUnit and allowed paths.
Prepare a minimal patch proposal inside the declared scope.
Record evidence refs without promotion claims.
patch_plan: Extend proposal receipts with path scope, risk, rollback, and expected evidence.
Validate generated receipts without applying source changes.
repo_facts_used: PROJECT_STATE.toml records plasma-v2-release-candidate as active before rc1 transition.
AIDE source mutation, automatic merge, and automatic release remain false.
PAW-H excludes stable promotion and compatibility certification.
risk_summary: Proposal receipts can become stale if WorkUnit scope changes.
Generated receipts must not be mistaken for applied patches.
rollback: Delete generated proposal receipts under out/aide/agentic.
Revert .aide/agentic policy changes if the checker fails.
